# Issue

Use this template for design proposals, bugs, and other repository issues.

## Summary

Describe the problem or proposal in one or two sentences.

## Context

What are you trying to change, and why does it matter?

## Details

- Relevant docs or code paths:
- Current behavior:
- Desired behavior:

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] The scope is clear
- [ ] The proposed change is aligned with the design docs when applicable
- [ ] Any follow-up work or risks are called out

## Additional Notes

Add links, examples, or anything else that will help reviewers understand the request.
